title: Telly 60k
description: It a 128x PvP pack for minecraft black and neon coloured based theme with animations
body: This time I present you "Telly 60k" PvP pack. its is a high resolution PvP texture pack it changes textures of every item and GUI based on dark and neon colours. This pack makes your PvP fights better and by new texture you can enjoy the minecraft new way.
